Legal notes

click to expand following section

†This tool is for informational purposes only and should not be relied upon as financial or other advice. All estimated calculations are based on the information you provide and the current benefits, offerings and rates or fees available through Scotiabank. Actual interest savings will depend on various factors including the outstanding balance and the amounts, timing and application of any payments made, the nature of the transactions and the interest rate of the credit card being compared. For example, the Interest Savings calculation example above is based upon an Introductory Balance Transfer promotional rate that applies to this card in the first year only (that will change from time to time), calculated against a competing 29.99% interest rate card, and assumes a constant balance (i.e. no other transactions posted) during a 12 months period. Interest rate comparison is subject to change. Interest saving values displayed are estimates only based on first year of account opening, use and current bonus offers (all of which are subject to change). All rates, fees, features, bonus offers and benefits and related terms and conditions are subject to change. Please visit your branch or call [1-800-472-6842](tel:1-800-472-6842) to speak with a Scotiabank representative about Scotiabank’s cards.
